projectDescription: WZRD Studio is an AI-powered creative desktop application for macOS that guides creators from concept to final delivery through node-based generation workflows, storyboarding, multi-track video editing, social publishing, and an agent-driven automation layer.
keyFeatures: Node-based AI generation studio (React Flow compute graph)
Storyboard generator with AI image and video shot generation
Director's Cut automated final assembly pipeline
QCut multi-track video editor with agent-drivable command API
Clip Studio with FFmpeg-powered trimming, waveform, and YouTube import
Kanvas generative remix and lyrics video composer
Postz social scheduler with OAuth multi-channel support and calendar view
Sourcify web content scraping and structured asset pipeline
IP Vault for on-chain intellectual property registration via Story Protocol
MCP server with agent skills (list-models, generate-shot, render-timeline, run-studio-graph, make-magic, edit-timeline)
Voice action layer powered by OpenAI Realtime API
Desktop deep-link scheme (wzrd://) for auth and OAuth callbacks
Thirdweb in-app wallet auth bridged to Supabase sessions
Credit-based billing with Stripe checkout and usage metering
publicApiSurface: window.wzrd.editor — renderer-global editor command API (addClip, splitElement, export, etc.)
window.wzrdDesktop — Electron preload IPC bridge (wzrd:media:*, wzrd:clip-studio:*, wzrd:qcut:*)
wzrd://postz/connected — desktop deep-link: Postz OAuth callback
